name: Red Pepper Bruschetta with Feta
recipeIngredient: 1 jar (7 oz.) roasted red peppers, drained and chopped
1 package (4 oz.) crumbled Feta cheese, finely chopped
1 loaf French bread, cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the peppers, minced garlic, 1 tablespoon olive oil, and lemon juice.
2. Stir in the chopped green onions and crumbled Feta cheese until well combined.
3. Preheat the broiler.
4. Brush the bread slices lightly with olive oil.
5. Place the bread slices on a cookie sheet and broil for each side until lightly toasted.
6. Top each toast slice with about 1 tablespoon of the pepper mixture.
7. Makes about 18 servings.
